texto: What importance should be given to details, in developing a subject?--Remorselessly sacrifice everything that does not contribute to clarity, verisimilitude, and effect.Accentuate everything that sets the main idea in relief, so that the impression be colourful, picturesque. It's sufficient that the rest be in its proper place, but in half-tone. That is what gives to style, as to painting, unity, perspective, and effect.- Constantin Georges Romain Héger, teacher to Charlotte Brontë
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Claire Harman que provoca temas ligados a educacao. Ao questionar “What importance should be given to details, in developing a subject?--Remorselessly sacrifice eve…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre educacao, editing, writers, com foco em writers e writing.
